SystemName: Race & Character Creation Bible (Final Canon Version)
Philosophy: Playable races exist for identity, aesthetics, and lore, and do not create mechanical power differences. This ensures absolute competitive fairness, visual freedom, and prevents meta-gaming race-class combinations.

CanonicalRules.Text: Playable races exist for identity, aesthetics, and lore and do not create mechanical power differences.
The game supports five playable races: Forest Elf, Human, Dwarf, Ice Elf, and Green Orc.
Playable races provide no mechanical combat, progression, or statistical advantages.
All playable races begin in the same starting region.
All newly created characters begin in the neutral starting city of Ironhold Bastion.
All playable races may choose any available class or vocation.
Race does not influence faction reputation, NPC behavior, or city access.
Chosen race is permanent and does not evolve into higher racial forms.
All playable races use identical gameplay hitboxes regardless of visual body proportions.
Character creation supports male and female gender selection.
Race systems must enhance identity and immersion without affecting gameplay balance.

ForestElf.Name: Forest Elf
ForestElf.Description: Ancient protectors of the whispering woods. Possess elegant visual style, leaf-braided hair, and natural organic patterns.

Human.Name: Human
Human.Description: Versatile and ambitious builders of empires. Characterized by balanced proportions and varied ancestral backgrounds.
Human.Aesthetics: Diverse styles, metallic details, traditional fabrics.

Dwarf.Name: Dwarf
Dwarf.Description: Resolute clans of the subterranean deeps. Known for broad statures, heavy ornate jewelry, and braided facial hair.
Dwarf.Aesthetics: Stout, metallic accents, stone and gemstone motifs.

IceElf.Name: Ice Elf
IceElf.Description: Stoic survivors of the eternal frozen peaks. Display frost-pale skin, pale blue eyes, and shimmering crystalline accessories.
IceElf.Aesthetics: Sleek, cool colors, crystalline geometric patterns.

GreenOrc.Name: Green Orc
GreenOrc.Description: Noble warriors from the volcanic steppes. Feature imposing heights, tusk protrusions, and runic skin tattoos.
GreenOrc.Aesthetics: Imposing, warm and rugged leather, metal spike motifs.

CharacterOptions.GenderImpact: Visual representations and voicelines only; 100% mechanical neutrality.
